guidelines.title: Developer Program Policy Baseline
guidelines.content: All Play apps must comply with the Google Play Developer Program Policies, including app content, user safety, and deceptive behavior rules.
manual_checks: Confirm no restricted or prohibited content is present.
Confirm app behavior and listing are not deceptive or misleading.
Confirm policy-specific declarations are complete in Play Console.

subsections.title: Restricted Content
subsections.content: Content categories such as illegal activity, sexual content, hate, violence, and regulated goods require strict policy compliance.
manual_checks: Review in-app content and user-generated surfaces for restricted categories.
Document moderation or blocking controls where applicable.

subsections.title: Deceptive Behavior
subsections.content: Apps must not misrepresent identity, functionality, or intent and must not use manipulative behavior.
manual_checks: Verify branding, screenshots, and description match actual app behavior.
Verify no impersonation or misleading claims.

guidelines.title: Sensitive Permissions and APIs
guidelines.content: High-risk permissions require clear user benefit and policy declarations. Access must be limited to core functionality.
manual_checks: Confirm each sensitive permission is core to app functionality.
Complete corresponding Play Console permission declarations.

guidelines.title: Target API Level Requirements
guidelines.content: Apps must target the required Android API level to remain discoverable and eligible for updates on Google Play.

guidelines.title: Release Configuration Integrity
guidelines.content: Release artifacts should not expose debug flags or placeholder package IDs, and should include release versioning metadata.

guidelines.title: Security and Network Hardening
guidelines.content: Apps should avoid cleartext traffic and insecure backup defaults unless there is an explicit and documented requirement.
manual_checks: Confirm release signing and key management policies are in place.
Confirm Play Integrity or equivalent anti-abuse controls for high-risk apps.

guidelines.title: Data Safety and Privacy Disclosures
guidelines.content: Play listing disclosures and in-app privacy details must accurately represent collection, sharing, retention, and security practices.
manual_checks: Validate Data safety form answers against actual runtime behavior and SDK data flows.
Ensure privacy policy URL is live and reflects current app behavior.

guidelines.title: User Account Deletion
guidelines.content: Apps that support account creation must provide account deletion paths and proper data handling after deletion.
manual_checks: Confirm in-app account deletion is available and functional.
Confirm deletion behavior and retention timing are documented.

guidelines.title: Store Listing and Metadata Accuracy
guidelines.content: Store listing text, screenshots, and claims must accurately represent app functionality and not include prohibited claims.
manual_checks: Verify screenshots and feature graphics reflect current app UI.
Verify no ranking claims, misleading superlatives, or prohibited metadata.

guidelines.title: Monetization and Payments
guidelines.content: Digital goods and subscriptions must follow Play billing requirements and policy restrictions.
manual_checks: Confirm in-app digital purchases use Google Play Billing where required.
Confirm subscription disclosures and cancellation paths are compliant.

guidelines.title: App Quality and Device Compatibility
guidelines.content: Apps should meet Android quality, stability, accessibility, and device compatibility expectations prior to release.
manual_checks: Review crash and ANR health prior to rollout.
Review compatibility and pre-launch test reports.
